title: Dense Syrian Garlic Bake
description: A garlicky, comforting dish to cure hangovers, featuring kosher salt and a low-fat-friendly recipe.
instructions: Mix together garlic, lamb, kosher salt, and black pepper in a bowl.
Drizzle olive oil over the mixture and mix well.
Transfer the mixture to a baking dish and cover with foil.
Bake for 1 hour and 15 minutes, then remove the foil and continue baking for another 30 minutes.
Sprinkle chopped parsley, fresh mint, and crushed sumac over the top and return to the oven for 5 minutes.
Let the dish rest for 10 minutes before serving with a dollop of unsalted yogurt on top.
Garnish with additional parsley and mint if desired.
Refrigerate leftovers for up to 3 days.
Reheat in the oven at 350°F (175°C) for 10-15 minutes before serving.
This dish is best served warm, straight from the oven.
The yogurt helps to balance the richness of the lamb and garlic.
Adjust the amount of garlic to your taste, but be warned: this is a garlicky dish!
